assignments.name: Assign_Asset_Name_Input_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Asset Name Input To Variable

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Assemblies_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Assemblies To Link

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Assets_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Assets To Link

assignments.description: Reset values from datatable selections and buttons to the state that they were in when the flow started running.
assignments.name: Reset_Flow_Values
assignments.label: Reset Flow Values

decisions.description: Null check before running DML delete operation
decisions.name: Assets_Selected_For_Deletion
decisions.label: Assets Selected For Deletion?

decisions.description: Check to avoid adding duplicate assemblies to the update list
decisions.name: Is_Assembly_Already_In_Update_List
decisions.label: Is Assembly Already In Update List?

rules.name: Yes_Assembly_Already_In_Update_List
rules.label: Yes - Assembly Already In Update List

decisions.description: Avoid the possibility of adding duplicate assets to the update list
decisions.name: Is_Asset_Already_Attached
decisions.label: Is Asset Already Attached?

decisions.description: Choose path to take based on the button clicked on the Asset / Assembly Selection Screen
decisions.name: Link_Selected_Records
decisions.label: Link Selected Records?

Flow.description: A console for multi-attaching Assets and Assemblies to a Ticket

formulas.name: f_AssembliesQuery
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "LIMIT 14",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "WHERE Name LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "LIMIT 14" )

formulas.name: f_AssetsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c LIMIT 14", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' LIMIT 14" )

Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Ticket Multi-Attach Console

fields.name: ErrorDisplay
fields.fieldText:
There was an error processing your request:


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

subflows.name: Update_Assets_and_Assemblies_Fields_On_Ticket
subflows.label: Update Assets and Assemblies Fields On Ticket

subflows.name: Update_Assets_and_Assemblies_Fields_On_Ticket_After_Delete
subflows.label: Update Assets and Assemblies Fields On Ticket - After Delete
